title: Minecraft: Askew
description: The FIRST Complete Audio Overhaul Resource Pack! Plus! much MUCH more!!
body:
BEFORE YOU DO ANYTHING!!!


-Install Optifine 1.20.1 !!!!!

-Turn off Mipmaps!! (Video Settings/Quality/Mipmap Levels: Off)


After these two teensy tiny tweaks Askew should work like a dream!!


It’s finally here! Minecraft Askew is the FIRST resource pack to completely overhaul the iconic game’s audio! Mobs, Blocks, Items, UI, a bunch of stuff! And a full 3 ½ hour OST! I know we love Vanilla, but it might be time to give Chocolate a try ;)!


Technically, here on Modrinth I’m a LIAR!!!!!

The resolution options are all multiples of 8 (8x,16x,32x,64x, etc) but Askew!!!! Is!!!!! Strange!!!!!

Askew textures are all 14x, which Minecraft was not built to understand!! So every single mob in the game is a custom model, even if it doesn’t look like it, the weird texture size fights with the format the models were set up in so even if they’re minor tweaks I still gotta do them so everything looks consistent :)!


Feature List!

Full OST!! 3 ½ hours of new music! It can’t bring your childhood memories back but it can help you make new ones :)!!



Sound Effect Overhaul!! New sounds for everyone!! Including you!!



Semi Shaders! Just some colored light shenanigans but still fun :)!!



Real-Time Seasons!!! Every 30 minutes your leaves will change!! The colors will “leaf” you………looking at them!!!!!!!!! ((Every 30 minutes))



Custom Armor!! Use an anvil for unique armor styles! Format is just “[​Material] [​Armor Type]” (e.g. “Emerald Helmet”)!



Custom Tools!! Use an anvil for unique tooool styles! Format is just “[​Material] [​Tool Type]” (e.g. “Rosegold Axe”)!



Custom Shields!! Use an anvil for this too!! There’s regular styles and some fun alternatives! ((pssst…try renaming your shield to “Diamond Sword” but also don’t tell anyone i told you its a secret :)!))



Mob Variations!! Some creatures have different looks! And some even have…OTHERER looks ;)!!!



Jokes!! The language in the game has been modified for many a chuckle! But I’ve made a separate “Vanilla” option in the languages if you wanna be less comical :)



Noteblocks & Cave Noises!! These count as sounds! But they were so excited to show off that they ESCAPED to another part of the list!!!



Player Model Villagers!!! I’ve always wanted to have player villagers and the INCREDIBLE sixfootblue made it a reality! Go check out their pack Haven 16x :)!!! (it’s genuinely SO GOOD)



SO MUCH MORE!!! this is not an exaggeration!!! There is SO. MUCH. MORE.



I’ve made a convenient visual album of the music available on YouTube here:

Minecraft: Askew FULL ALBUM [​Seamless + Gameplay]

PLEASE!! I don’t want to sound like a beggar! But I worked so hard on this pack, and it would mean the world if you could spare a couple bucks,
thanks boss :)!

Support Minecraft: Askew on Ko-Fi!

Album available on:


Spotify

Apple Music

Soundcloud

Bandcamp


And pretty much everywhere else you get music!:)!!


That’s all the previews you’re gettin outta me! Go give it a try! :)!!
